method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile match but purpose mismatch and low route similarity.

1311.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch outweigh high kms similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms similarity high but insufficient to offset stop mismatch.

1312.llm_rationale: High stop-profile and kms similarity but purpose mismatch limits confidence.

1350.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile match, purpose/duty match, decent kms similarity; route similarity weak.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose/duty match; kms similarity fairly high (0.66).

1363.llm_rationale: Decent stop-profile correlation but low kms similarity and purpose mismatch reduce overall alignment.

1421.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile, strong purpose/duty match, decent kms similarity.

1423.llm_rationale: Same negative stop-profile pattern and purpose mismatch as similar pair, low overall similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; kms similarity high (0.78) but stop mismatch dominates.

1506.llm_rationale: No stop-profile correlation and duty-cycle mismatch indicate fundamentally different operating pattern despite higher route similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest among all pairs (0.19) but insufficient alone.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle mismatch (0.0) and purpose mismatch strongly reduce similarity.

1575.llm_rationale: Solid stop-profile and near-identical kms usage, offset by purpose mismatch.

1576.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile correlation, matched purpose and duty cycle; low route-image similarity and age similarity temper the score slightly.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Solid positive correlation (0.63) indicates similar stop-zone timing.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low (0.05), representative routes differ in shape.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match fully; age and kms only moderate.

1578.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile and kms similarity, but purpose mismatch and negligible route similarity.

1667.llm_rationale: Zero stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch indicate little shared behavior.

1687.llm_rationale: Weaker stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch with modest metadata alignment.

1688.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation indicates opposing stop patterns despite matching purpose/duty; overall similarity low.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose/duty match, but stop-profile mismatch dominates.

1785.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation strongly indicates dissimilar stop behavior despite purpose/duty match.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose/duty match cannot offset opposing stop pattern.

1993.llm_rationale: Very high stop-profile correlation offset by purpose mismatch, suggesting different truck roles despite similar stop timing.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) reduces confidence in operational similarity.

2191.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile match, purpose mismatch, high kms similarity.

2201.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation and relatively higher route similarity, but purpose mismatch and low kms similarity.

2518.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation but purpose mismatch and lower age/kms similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch; age similarity weakest so far (0.21).

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
